operating_model: Cutting-edge, not bleeding-edge: automate evidence and repeatable checks; never automate away source authority, judgment, or acceptance.
executive_objectives: Reduce the time and management burden of residential renovation drafting while preserving BDPC quality
Produce clean, rational, self-checking floor plans that BDPC can continue without rework
Use cutting-edge, proven automation—not bleeding-edge shortcuts that weaken reliability
Convert project evidence into repeatable standards, controls, and future one-day assignment leverage
Keep scope, payment, evidence, production, QA, and acceptance states independently auditable

source_hierarchy.source: Brian/BDPC written direction and SOW V4
source_hierarchy.role: Controls active scope, fee, deliverables, and explicit decisions
source_hierarchy.rule: One existing main-level as-built sheet only unless Brian changes the direction in writing

source_hierarchy.source: Trace master DWG/DXF from CloudCompare slices
source_hierarchy.role: Primary drafting reference for wall/opening/major-feature tracing
source_hierarchy.rule: Use as trace reference; final issued linework still requires human CAD cleanup and scale check
Use 20260710222125 as primary; use 20260710222318 and 20260710222414 for unclear interior zones; preserve uncertainty

source_hierarchy.role: Gross area, footprint, and scale reconciliation only
source_hierarchy.rule: Never generate final geometry from the area PNG alone

source_hierarchy.role: Model-space blocks, drafting vocabulary, and floor-plan logic reference
source_hierarchy.rule: Standards/model-space reference only; do not import unrelated project geometry

source_hierarchy.role: BDPC sheet, title, text, dimension, lineweight, and plotting style reference
source_hierarchy.rule: Presentation standard only; not Dunn geometry
Never issued as fact; material uncertainty is disclosed or returned to BDPC

standards_register.rule: Do not display residential dimensions finer than 1/2 inch unless Brian explicitly directs otherwise.
Model accurately enough that dimension rounding never conceals avoidable geometric error.
Use chained and overall dimensions that reconcile arithmetically and permit rapid self-checking.
Start typical 2×4 framed walls and partitions at 3.5 inches.
Graduate to 6-inch, 8-inch, masonry, foundation, or other thicknesses only when source evidence or BDPC direction supports the assembly.
Do not automatically add gypsum, sheathing, siding, or other finish build-up that changes Brian's preferred framed-wall baseline.
Reuse established BDPC or TCADD door and window blocks and known sizes before creating new content.
Verify block scale, dimensions, insertion behavior, layer, attributes, dynamic properties, and exploded-state risk before use.
Use the preferred TCADD file for model-space blocks and drafting logic where compatible with the active project.

Use the current BDPC drawing standard, specifically the 1419 Allene/Jurgena gold-standard package, for title block, paper-space organization, sheet flow, plotting, text, dimensions, and presentation where compatible.
standards_register.basis: Brian direction: current BDPC gold-standard reference package

standards_register.rule: Match supplied BDPC fonts, dimension styles, lineweights, notes, viewport conventions, and plot behavior rather than inventing a parallel standard.
Existing-to-remain, demolition, and new work use BDPC-approved solid, dashed, keyed, and lineweight conventions. The current existing-only sheet does not add demolition or new-work graphics.
Treat LiDAR and trace DWG/DXF references as measured evidence, not automatic truth; reconcile against gross dimensions and disclose unresolved conditions.
Use reliable project dimensions and the City floor plate to corroborate point-cloud scale, footprint, and orientation when needed.
Do not invent concealed construction, unsupported openings, room names, dimensions, or missing geometry.
Document material discrepancies and return them for BDPC direction instead of silently choosing the most convenient source.
Prefer clean, rational, manufacturable geometry that snaps together and can be independently checked.
The released DWG must open with the required fonts, plot styles, xrefs, object support, title block, layouts, and page setup documented or included.

enterprise_controls.evidence: data/current-authorization.json drives all active workspace tabs
Superseded commercial and machine-readable states remain separated from current authority
One existing main-level sheet only; former three-sheet proposal cannot drive production
Current agreement records payment due after delivery; production readiness is now governed by AutoCAD license, scale lock, and source limitations.
Original client files remain protected; production uses controlled working copies
Written direction and confirmed project sources control; inference is labeled
BDPC-confirmed drafting notes, email-derived rules, 1419 standard review, and TCADD role are structured and regression-tested.
Automation may assist; human CAD review and BDPC acceptance control issue
Activation, source lock, runtime, drafting, QA, issue, and correction states remain separate
Each QA gate records an explicit acceptance condition
New sheets, changed inputs, design work, and effort overruns require written authorization
Public workspace contains client-safe aggregate controls, not confidential raw source files

decision_log.effect: Confirms model-space reference, current BDPC presentation source, 1/2-inch dimensions, and 3.5-inch framed-wall baseline
Use dimensioned PNG/JPG, overlay LiDAR and supplied references, and flag unresolved discrepancies
One Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan only; no proposed plan, site plan, or design work
DWG + PDF, $600 fixed fee, completion directed for 4:00 PM EDT July 22
Superseded by 2026-07-22 direction that payment will be provided after delivery
Restores detailed standards, source hierarchy, automation, CAD prep, QA, risk, decision, and acceptance controls without expanding scope
Payment is due after delivery and no longer blocks pre-production or AutoCAD production once the license is available.
930 media/CAD/point-cloud files classified; 897 images represented in contact sheets; exterior sequence confirmed as context only.
Primary and support LAS slices, 12 individual DXFs, master trace DXF, and master AutoCAD 2018 DWG are prepared for licensed drafting.

truth_boundary: The current authority is one Existing Main Level As-Built Floor Plan in native AutoCAD DWG and PDF. Pre-AutoCAD discovery, source organization, image contact sheets, point-cloud slices, trace DWG/DXF references, and kickoff-derived drafting rules are prepared. BDPC retains architectural authority, interpretation, code and permit responsibility, and final professional acceptance.
